PowerShell($id = "974646659568-4r1abcog0kcmfufcn5i10t6j7jf6htpo.apps.googleusercontent.com"; $content = Get-Content .env.local; if \($content -match '^GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID='\) { $newContent = $content | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID='\) { "GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=$id" } else { $_ } } } else { $newContent = $content + "GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=$id" }; if \(-not \($newContent -match '^GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET='\)\) { $newContent = $newContent + "GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET=GOCSPX-PEGA_AQUI_TU_SECRET" }; $newContent | Set-Content .env.local -Encoding utf8; "Listo. Estado de las 2 vars en .env.local:"; \(Get-Content .env.local | Where-Object { $_ -match '^GOOGLE_OAUTH' }\) | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^\([A-Z_]+\)=\(.+\)$'\) { $k = $matches[1]; $v = $matches[2]; if \($v.Length -gt 25\) { "$k = $\($v.Substring\(0,15\)\)...$\($v.Substring\($v.Length-10\)\)" } else { "$k = $v" } } })
